arts.ttl: Juventus vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City visit Juventus in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola cuts a lonely figure as he turns on his Man City stars for their 'mistakes' during alarming slump in form, insisting they must 'do the simple things better'
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Given the length of this season, ending at the Club World Cup in July, Champions League play-offs are two extra games City could really do without.

arts.ttl: Five Man City players who could leave in January
arts.sum: 21-year-old Josh Wilson-Esbrand has been part of Man City's first team for some time, but minutes have been hard to come by. Starting at the back, it is clear that Ederson's illustrious time at Man City is coming to an end.

arts.ttl: I won’t manage another club after Manchester City – Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The Spaniard revealed his intentions in an interview with celebrity chef Dani Garcia.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer questions Man City and Pep Guardiola amid telling Cole Palmer point
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has been a revelation for club and country since leaving Man City to join Chelsea in 2023.

arts.ttl: When is Man City - Man United? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Their recent form hasn’t been great with a 2-2 draw against Crystal Palace, a 3-0 victory over Nottingham Forest, and a 0-2 loss to Liverpool . The game between Man City - Man United will be played on Sunday December 15 at Ethihad Stadium with kick off at 11:30 a.m. ET / 8:30 a.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola rules out managing another club after Manchester City
arts.sum: Guardiola interested in international coaching role ‘I’m going to stop. I am not going to join another team’ Pep Guardiola has ruled himself out of managing another club after Manchester City due to a waning of his energy levels, stating an international coaching position would be of interest to him as his next role. Guardiola signed a new contract with the champions in November until summer 2026 that will extend his tenure to a decade. The 53-year-old is yet to decide if he will depart then but, whenever he does, Guardiola has said he will not take charge of a club side again. Continue reading...
